title: Punjab and Haryana High Court – Clerk – 1265 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Punjab and Haryana High Court Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 1265 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Punjab and Haryana High Court Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 1265 vacancies for Clerk posts. Candidates can apply online only from 26.05.2026 to 23.06.2026 through Punjab and Haryana High Court website sssc.gov.in.
basic_details.job_type: Regular / Permanent (candidates must be willing to serve anywhere in Haryana State)

age_limit.age_details: Candidates availing age relaxation on this basis must submit experience certificate(s) for equivalent post issued by the Appointing Authority of the respective Department/Board/Corporation/Government-aided Institution in original when demanded.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor of Arts (BA) or Bachelor of Science (BSc) or equivalent from a recognized university with proficiency in computers (Word Processing and Spread Sheets).

salary_details.pay_scale: As per latest rules and instructions issued by the Government of Haryana adopted for Subordinate Courts of Haryana

selection_process: Online Written Examination (Computer Based Test) + Computer Proficiency Test (CPT) + Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted in online mode only under the head "Clerk Subordinate Courts of Haryana" on the official website www.sssc.gov.in. No other means or mode of submission will be accepted. Applicants must first complete a Registration Form followed by the Application Form, which is linked to the fee payment gateway. The online application form is submitted only after successful payment of fee. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date and not wait till 23-06-2026 at 04:00 PM. Incomplete applications will be rejected outright without any communication.
